observations.correspondence_rationale: The text references 'Dan, the city at the base of Mount Hermon, where the ancients said the boundary between earth and heaven grew thin,' directly alluding to the biblical city of Dan, which is historically located near Mount Hermon and associated with a liminal spiritual boundary.
observations.summary: The mention of Dan as a city at the base of Mount Hermon aligns with the biblical location of Dan, known as a boundary between earth and heaven, establishing an explicit allusion to the biblical motif of sacred geography.

evidence.quote: Dan. The city at the base of Mount Hermon, where the ancients said the boundary between earth and heaven grew thin.
